entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Demonstrate an understanding of the concept of Computer Science
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe the concept of Computer Science (meaning, importance, application)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming and Think-Ink-Pair Share (TIPS): Through brainstorming and Think-Ink-Pair Share (TIPS) guide students to describe the concept of Computer Science
entries.assessment: Confidently describe the concept of Computer Science field
resources: Handouts with contents of Computer Science concepts
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form One: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 1.1 Demonstrate an understanding of the concept of Computer Science
entries.learning_activity: (b) Describe fields related to Computer Science (IT, ICT, IS, Computer Engineering)
teaching_learning_activities: Question and answer, guest speaker; and/or case study: Use question and answer, guest speaker; and case study to guide students to describe fields related to Computer Science
entries.assessment: Confidently describe fields related to Computer Science
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form One: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 1.2 Demonstrate an understanding of computer systems
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe computer systems (Meaning, types, functions, and significance)
teaching_learning_activities: Questions and answers: Through questions and answers guide students to describe computer system
entries.assessment: Clearly describe computer systems
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form One: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 1.2 Demonstrate an understanding of computer systems
entries.learning_activity: (b) Describe computer hardware (meaning, components, functions, computer generation)
teaching_learning_activities: Small groups: Guide students in small groups to describe computer hardware.
Demonstration: Use demonstration to show different components of computer hardware
practical work: Guide students through practical work to connect different parts of computer system
entries.assessment: Realise parts of computer hardware and their functions
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form One: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 1.2 Demonstrate an understanding of computer systems
entries.learning_activity: (d) Describe and observe principles of computer system handling (safety measures, management, cleanliness, data backup and utilities)
teaching_learning_activities: Group discussion: Though group discussion students to describe principles of computer handling.
Demonstration: Teacher to demonstrate on how to perform computer handling technique
Practical work: Students through practical work to practice on computer handling
entries.assessment: Clearly observe principles of handling the computer system
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form One: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 1.3 Demonstrate mastery of maintenance and troubleshooting of computer system
entries.learning_activity: (a) Install simple computer software
teaching_learning_activities: Demonstration
Practical Work: Through demonstration guide students to install simple software and students to do Practical work on installation of software
entries.assessment: Can install computer software
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form One: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 1.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic Concepts of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 1.3 Demonstrate mastery of maintenance and troubleshooting of computer system
entries.learning_activity: (b) Organise computer files in different operating systems (windows, Linux, etc)
teaching_learning_activities: Demonstration
Practical Work: Through demonstration guide students to organise computer files and students to do practical work to organise computer files
entries.assessment: Can use operating systems to organise computer files
resources: simulated steps videos and smart phone
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form One: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education

entries.main_competence: 2.0 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles of Computer Science
entries.specific_competence: 2.1 Demonstrate mastery of the basic principles in problem solving
entries.learning_activity: (a) Describe the steps in solving a problem using computers (concept of problem solving, steps of problem solving, concept of algorithms)
teaching_learning_activities: Brainstorming: Through brainstorming guide students to describe the steps of solving a problem using computer
entries.assessment: Clearly describe the steps of solving a problem using computer
resources: hand outs of of the basic principles in problem solving and tablets
entries.references: TIE, Computer Science for Secondary Schools Form One: Student's Book and Teacher's Guide (2023 Edition), Tanzania Institute of Education
